messages.content:
<page>
This is an example web page content
</page>
Summarise the content in between the <page> tags. Stay faithful to what is written there: capture the main facts and themes, do not invent details, and use clear neutral prose.

responses.name: Model One
responses.text: This is an example of a great summary.

responses.name: Model Two
responses.text: This is an example of an okay summary.

responses.name: Model Three
responses.text: This is an example of a bad summary.
